sentences.text: shadows written by katie moore focus question what is a shadow
a dark shape forms when light is blocked this shape is called a shadow
this shadow is a round shape
this shadow is a square shape
this shadow is a long shape
this shadow is a short shape
this shadow is a big shape
this shadow is a little shape
shadows can be any shape this shadow is my shape
connections writing make a list of five shadows and share them with your class sort the shadows into groups science where does the light that makes shadows come from share your ideas with your class
